de.title: Data Engineer
de.tagline: Building scalable data pipelines & intelligent automation systems
de.summary: Results-driven Data Engineer with hands-on experience designing and deploying end-to-end data pipelines, workflow automation, and AI-powered solutions. Proficient in Databricks, PySpark, Apache Airflow, and cloud-native tools. Passionate about transforming raw data into reliable, high-performance systems that drive business decisions.

swe.title: Software Engineer / Full Stack Developer
swe.tagline: Crafting robust full-stack applications with data-driven backends
swe.summary: Versatile Software Engineer with experience building full-stack web applications, REST APIs, and data-intensive backend systems. Skilled in Python, FastAPI, Streamlit, MySQL, and modern DevOps practices including GitLab CI/CD. Adept at translating complex business requirements into clean, maintainable, and scalable software solutions.

ds.title: Data Scientist / ML Engineer
ds.tagline: Turning complex datasets into actionable insights and predictive models
ds.summary: Analytical Data Scientist and ML Engineer with expertise in exploratory data analysis, machine learning model development, and statistical modeling. Experienced with supervised and unsupervised learning, feature engineering, MLflow model tracking, and delivering data visualizations that communicate insights clearly to stakeholders.

ai.title: AI / LLM Engineer
ai.tagline: Designing intelligent AI agents and generative AI solutions at scale
ai.summary: Innovative AI/LLM Engineer with proven experience building production-grade conversational AI systems, agentic pipelines, and generative AI applications. Proficient in OpenAI, Phi-3, Groq, CrewAI, and ChromaDB. Holds three Databricks certifications in Generative AI and Data Engineering. Passionate about pushing the boundaries of what LLMs and SLMs can automate.

bullets: Designed and deployed end-to-end health check data pipelines on Databricks, categorizing pipeline runs as 'On-Time', 'Delayed', or 'Missed SLA', reducing undetected failures by proactively surfacing issues.
Built automated SMTP-based email alert pipelines triggering notifications for missed SLA and delayed jobs, improving incident response time across data teams.
Developed pre-QC alert pipelines for new source system onboarding, ensuring data quality checks are enforced before ingestion into the data lakehouse.
Engineered automated Airflow DAG scheduling logic enabling brand-specific job triggering on configurable date-time windows, reducing manual intervention in pipeline operations.

Designed and developed the Candidate Assessment Portal as a solo full-stack engineer using Streamlit, MySQL, Pandas, and XlsxWriter — featuring role-based access control, dynamic MCQ quiz engine with timers, and admin analytics dashboards.

Built a Clinical Trials Chatbot leveraging Microsoft Phi-3-mini SLM and Groq open-source API, integrating ChromaDB for vector retrieval over structured/unstructured documents and S3/database connections for scalable input sources.
Implemented GitLab CI/CD workflows for version control and automated deployment of data engineering pipelines, reducing release cycle time.
Collaborated on UI/UX design and web-based tooling for internal data platforms, improving usability for non-technical stakeholders.

projects.name: Candidate Assessment Portal
projects.description: Interactive web-based platform to streamline candidate evaluations with role-based access, dynamic quiz engine, and admin analytics.
highlights: Built secure authentication with role-based access (Admin / Candidate) in Streamlit
Implemented Excel-based MCQ upload with domain and tech stack categorization
Developed quiz engine with countdown timers, auto-submission, and real-time scoring
Created admin dashboards with Pandas + XlsxWriter for candidate performance export
Designed and managed full MySQL schema with CRUD operations

projects.name: Clinical Trials Chatbot
projects.description: Conversational AI chatbot for querying ClinicalTrials.gov data using a Small Language Model (SLM) with vector retrieval over structured and unstructured inputs.
highlights: Integrated Microsoft Phi-3-mini SLM and Groq open-source API for low-latency inference
Built ChromaDB vector store for semantic retrieval over clinical trial documents
Supported structured and unstructured file inputs (PDFs, CSVs, database connections, S3)
Designed conversational context management for multi-turn dialogue accuracy
Enabled flexible data source connections including S3 buckets and relational databases

projects.name: Data Pipeline Health Check System
projects.description: Automated pipeline monitoring and alerting system built on Databricks and Apache Airflow, providing real-time SLA tracking and email-based incident alerts.
highlights: Categorized pipeline runs into On-Time, Delayed, and Missed SLA buckets
Built SMTP email alert pipeline for automated stakeholder notifications
Developed pre-QC new source system alert pipeline for early issue detection
Automated brand-specific Airflow DAG scheduling based on configurable time windows
Reduced manual monitoring effort through full end-to-end automation

education.institution: SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST)

certifications.name: Databricks Certified Generative AI Engineer Associate
